title: Campaign website rebuilt and relaunched
description: The Fred Francis 2028 campaign site has been rebuilt as a fast, fully indexable website with real pages for every issue, an accountability framework, and a way to make your voice heard on every proposal.

title: New issue: AI -- Learning to Manage a Novel, Useful Tool
description: A federally coordinated research effort -- NIST, NASA, DARPA, and the NTSB, working with industry standards bodies like ASME, IEEE, and JEDEC -- to characterize non-deterministic AI and make real applicability recommendations, built on existing federal precedent rather than starting from scratch.

title: Meet the candidate
description: Fred Francis now has a face on the front page.  Come see who's running.
